body:
This PR introduces `transform_dates!` and `set_reference_date!`. The first function is an in-place version of `transform_dates`. The second function updates the reference/start date and the time dimension of a `OutputVar`.

Adding both of these functions allow for the deprecation of `new_start_date` and `shift_by` which remove the responsibility of fixing the dates and times from the `OutputVar` constructor.
title: Add utilities for transforming dates in OutputVar
